_comment: STING healthcare material gates — HTM 04-01 / HTM 03-01 / NCRP 147 / MRI Zone IV.
_help: where: element predicate — categoryIn (list), paramRegex (dict), paramEquals (dict), paramGreaterThan (dict).
materialMustRegex      — finding fires when material does NOT match.
materialMustNotRegex   — finding fires when material DOES match.
materialClassRegex     — finding fires when material's Class does NOT match.

rules.message: Water / medical-gas pipework must not use lead-soldered or leaded-brass material — HTM 04-01 prohibits lead in potable water + medical gas systems.
Domestic-water pipework should be copper, stainless steel, or PEX — confirm material against HTM 04-01 §4.
Element falls inside MRI Zone IV (5G line) — ferrous materials are prohibited. Switch to brass / aluminium / stainless / non-ferrous fixings.
Element is in MRI Zone III — ferrous materials need a documented MR-safety risk assessment. Prefer non-ferrous when feasible.
Isolation / protective-environment / ICU finishes must be wipeable, non-porous, and antimicrobial. Replace porous finishes with vinyl sheet, hygienic resin, or sealed mineral surface.
Element has RAD_LEAD_MM_NR > 0 but its material is not lead-class. The Pb thickness can't be delivered by the assigned material — bind to BLE_Lead_RadShield_*mm or equivalent.
Essential-Electrical-Services cables in healthcare spaces should use LSZH (low-smoke zero-halogen) sheathing — confirm BLE_/MEP_ material against BS 7211.
